title: Tool Design, Errors, Pagination, and Context Efficiency · Extension System Mission
summary: A documentation engineering group. The group needs efficient resource search and narrow update tools with typed errors and protocol tests. Planned artifact: Deliver Local Knowledge MCP Server with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish host, per-server client, server, model, user, and external service responsibilities.
Expose readable addressable context as resources or templates rather than action tools.
Test discovery, valid calls, invalid arguments, errors, concurrency, and shutdown.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""
